title: MEDIA ADDICTION AND SOCIAL ISOLATION OF YOUTH
author: Najmiddinova Sarafroz Najmiddinovna, Akbarova Shahzoda Bekzodovna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article reveals the peculiarities of the influence of social networks on the younger generation. At the same time, it examines the illusions common among young people and the mechanisms of the desire to move or deviate from the right path by immersing themselves in interesting activities.
steps_raw: This article reveals the peculiarities of the influence of social networks on the younger generation. At the same time, it examines the illusions common among young people and the mechanisms of the desire to move or deviate from the right path by immersing themselves in interesting activities.
keywords: Adaptation, media world , public networks ,suicide among children ,  media education,  teenagers , the youth.
